Friday Fifteen: June 22nd Edition

June 22, 2012

Each Friday I am going to attempt to give you high quality reading material for the weekend, in the form of fifteen links from the previous week.

Here we go — I hope you enjoy:

Technology/Business/Productivity/Etc.

  • Embrace Cubicle Nation
  • Foreigners share surprising facts about the US
  • How to Get more Done (Part 1) – Do Less
  • Bath Salts: Deep in the Heart of America's New Drug Nightmare
  • Cranking
  • The Network I Want
  • Reading for your ears: Back to Work podcast (all)

Politics

  • What exactly is Obamacare and what did it change? - (Read the comments too.)
  • New NSA docs contradict 9/11 claims
  • Why are teachers being fired?
  • The Second Term
  • Romney's Cold War Strategy To Defeat Obama
  • Romney's Make-Believe Military Budget
  • Middle class could face higher taxes under Republican plan, analysis finds
  • Where's The Line Between A Cult And A Religion? - And here.
